burr.hi: बर्र (धातु का उभरा हुआ नुकीला किनारा)
burr.note: no single-word Hindi equivalent in common shop-floor use; kept as transliterated term with a descriptive gloss

flank_wear.hi: फ्लैंक वियर (टूल के किनारे की घिसाई)
flank_wear.note: CNC-specific term; workers are more likely to recognize the English term than a translated one

tolerance.note: dimensional tolerance is out of scope for Module 1's image-classification approach; kept here for future modules that surface measurement data
